events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: a splice found outside any junction box is a direct NEC violation (splices must be enclosed, and termination methods must meet NEC 110.14). Since this is an energized, in-service circuit, it's flagged as **fail / high risk**, with corrective actions centered on de-energizing, verifying the connection method, and enclosing it in a proper listed box before re-energizing.
